description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The post text reads: 'Remember when I gave Iran ten days to MAKE A DEAL or OPEN UP THE HORMUZ STRAIT. Time is running out - 48 hours before all Hell will reign down on them. Glory be to GOD! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. The image is plain black text on a white background.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Remember when I gave Iran ten days to MAKE A DEAL or OPEN UP THE HORMUZ STRAIT
